PRIYA RAMANATHAN
Bengaluru, India | priya.r@example.com | linkedin.com/in/example

EXPERIENCE

Senior Product Manager, Pine Labs — Bengaluru
Mar 2023 - Present
- Responsible for the merchant onboarding product area and its roadmap
- Cut merchant onboarding drop-off from 41% to 23% by removing two redundant KYC steps
- Improved the onboarding flow based on feedback from the sales team
- Ran 18 merchant interviews to identify why mid-market signups stalled, which redirected the Q3 roadmap
- Worked on the payments retry logic with engineering
- Launched a self-serve settlement dashboard used by 4,200 merchants in the first quarter

Product Manager, Razorpay — Bengaluru
Jun 2021 - Feb 2023
- Managed the disputes and chargeback experience
- Shipped an automated evidence-collection flow that reduced manual dispute handling time by 60%
- Helped the engineering team with sprint planning and backlog grooming
- Defined the dispute resolution SLA metric and drove it from 9 days to 4 days
- Presented the quarterly disputes review to the leadership team

Associate Product Manager, Freshworks — Chennai
Jul 2019 - May 2021
- Assisted with the CRM mobile app release
- Built an internal tool that let support agents resolve tickets without escalating to engineering
- Participated in user research sessions

PROJECTS
- Created a bot that summarizes competitor pricing pages weekly

SKILLS
SQL, Amplitude, Figma, Jira, A/B testing, roadmapping

EDUCATION
B.Tech, Computer Science — Anna University, 2019
